metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code skills for PR review, context optimization, spec-driven development, and deep research workflows. Includes DLC workflow skills (dlc-build, dlc-review, dlc-respond, dlc-debug), utility skills, custom agents, workflow automation hooks, and output styles.
